name: YU-GI-OH ARC V RPG
description:
A WORLD WHERE PEOPLE FIGHT BETWEEN DUELS

STANDARD DIMENSION

In the standard dimension, Leo Duel School exists under the company of Leo Akaba who has traveled through dimensions of Fusion and created the ‘Academia’. In this dimension, Yuya Sakaki, the root of pendulum summon existed and was the son of a pro entertainment duelist named Yusyo Sakaki, then a girl named Yuzu is someone special to him.

FUSION DIMENSION

A dimension where Leo Akaba rules, Leo Akaba plans to unite all of the existing dimensions into one by invading all of them one by one, he also captures every girl identical to the person named ‘Serena’ a skilled duelist, he ordered a man named Yuri who looks exactly like Yuya Sakaki.

XYZ DIMENSION

Duelists in Academia invaded the dimension of Xyz and made the heartland a place of battle field. Xyz dimension is where Kurosaki Syun, Kurosaki Ruri, and Yuto was raised, Ruri was taken away by a duelist in Academia under the orders of Leo Akaba.

SYNCRO DIMENSION

A dimension where duelists battle with D-wheels, riding duel. In this dimension, a person who looks exactly like Yuya and Yuto Exists, he was named Hugo while another person named Rin is identical to Ruri, Serena, and Yuzu.

THE RPG INCLUDES THESE FOLLOWING CHARACTERS:
